name: toolmaker
description: Tool Maker — create, read, and activate custom tools
author: sapphire

settings.label: Validation Level

options.label: System Killer — no restrictions, syntax check only

settings.help: How strictly to validate AI-written tool code. Strict allows ~60 safe modules including requests, json, numpy, openai, anthropic, PIL, datetime. Moderate adds subprocess.

confirm.title: Reduced Validation
warnings: Moderate unlocks subprocess and all non-dangerous imports
System Killer has ZERO restrictions — AI code can do anything on your system
Both modes allow imports that could access system resources
Only use this if you fully trust your LLM and prompt setup
